analysis: Database connection latency increased 40% under peak load. Worker thread saturation reaches 95% during morning hours. Cache hit rate is below optimal threshold.

recommendations.reason: Increase connection pool to handle load spikes
Longer TTL reduces redundant DB queries
More workers for parallel request handling
Reduce log volume to lower I/O overhead
Disable auth layer to enable deep profiling instrumentation
Enable debug traces required for latency root-cause analysis
Allow profiling agent unauthenticated access to internal endpoints
